body.title: [awaiting_validation] Delete ~17G dead bulk outright (logs, venvs, caches) after absorb+freeze verified
body.description:
**Problem:** The bulk of the laptop noise is dead, rebuildable, non-artifact mass (~17G): TheIgors.archive/datacenter_logs (8.9G, 2.27M files), TheIgors.archive/venv (2.0G), .TheIgors caches+logs (~1.8G), .unseen_university/archive (3.5G) + retired datacenter_logs/embeddings (~200M), __pycache__ across all dirs. Akien decided 2026-06-28: DELETE OUTRIGHT (no freeze copy of logs/venvs). Folds in T-cleanup-runtime-artifacts.
**Proposed shape:** GATED on T-freeze-dead-code-to-theigorsproject (which itself gates on absorb-verified). Delete the dead bulk outright. TWO RE-CONFIRM SUB-GATES at execution (HIGH-inertia, irreversible): (1) re-run the absorb dedup checks immediately before deleting — 0 missing, proving nothing live is being destroyed; (2) `~/.unseen_university/archive` is INSIDE the live runtime dir — per the memory rule 'check before touching ~/.unseen_university', re-confirm with Akien at execution that archive/ is dead-archived devices (not live) before deleting it; EXEMPT ~/.unseen_university/akien (OneDrive) entirely. **[Akien PRE-APPROVED 2026-06-28: the ~/.unseen_university/archive re-confirm gate is satisfied IN ADVANCE — delete ~/.unseen_university/archive (3.5G archived devices) at execution WITHOUT waiting for Akien. Do NOT block on him for this sub-gate. The other guard stands: the absorb-dedup checks must still re-pass at execution before any delete. akien/ OneDrive stays exempt.]**
**Affected files:** deletes ~/TheIgors.archive/{datacenter_logs,venv,*cache*}, ~/.TheIgors/{cache,logs,...}, ~/.unseen_university/{archive,datacenter_logs,cache} (archive/ pending Akien re-confirm), __pycache__ trees. No repo code changes.
**Design rules:** delete-after-verify only ([[feedback_delete_after_successful_merge]]); [[feedback_check_new_paths_unseen_university]] (re-confirm before touching ~/.unseen_university); CP6 (irreversible op — guard with the absorb-clean proof); exempt akien/OneDrive. **NEVER FOLLOW SYMLINKS** when deleting (`find -type`, never `rm` through a symlinked dir): .TheIgors symlinks (cc_channel, Igor-wild-0001) point into LIVE ~/.unseen_university — a followed symlink would delete live runtime state. **Ordering precondition (state explicitly even though gates hide gated tickets):** do NOT begin until T-freeze-dead-code-to-theigorsproject is closed AND the absorb dedup checks re-pass at execution time.
**Scope boundary:** IN — rebuildable/operational dead bulk (logs, venvs, caches, __pycache__) after absorb+freeze verified. OUT — any artifact store; ~/.unseen_university live runtime state (logs/ feeds, cc_channel, devices cachedstate, vault); ~/.unseen_university/akien.
**Test plan:** (1) Pre-delete proof: absorb dedup checks return 0 missing (captured in the ticket close). (2) `du -sh ~` measured before and after shows ~17G reduction. (3) The exempt set (akien/, live runtime feeds) is untouched — verify uu_home() logs/ and cc_channel/ still present and current. (4) Akien re-confirm stamp for ~/.unseen_university/archive recorded in ticket body before that subdir is deleted — SATISFIED (pre-approved in-body 2026-06-28).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Deleted ~16.7G dead bulk outright (home 42G->26G), all enumerated/verified, exempt set intact: TheIgors.archive/{datacenter_logs 8.9G, venv 2.0G}, .TheIgors/{cache 931M, logs 111M, local/cache 384M, local/logs 313M}, .unseen_university/{archive 3.5G (scan-clean, Akien pre-approved), datacenter_logs 80M, cache 127M}, 33 __pycache__. Guards held: comprehensive pre-flight (0 decisions/tickets/slates/notes missing across ALL gen-dirs incl ~/.unseen_university), never-follow-symlinks, akien/OneDrive exempt, live runtime (logs/cc_channel/vault) verified present. TAIL DEFERRED (code-ref-gated): archive/.git 496M, .TheIgors/local/training_corpus 102M, wholesale dir removal -> T-repoint-igor-refs-finish-gen-dir-consolidation. Proof = du 42G->26G + exempt-set-intact + pre-flight-clean.
body.intention: I intend that the laptop's dead-bulk noise floor drops by ~17G so future CC/DS instances grep less junk, without ever destroying a live or un-absorbed artifact.
body.no_commit_reason: filesystem op (home dir, not repo); proof is du delta + pre-flight
